mapper.insert: INSERT INTO excel_mapping_templates ( template_name, header_structure, mapping_rules, target_sys_type, user_id ) VALUES ( #{templateName}, #{headerStructure, typeHandler=com.paycoms.cp7.api.infrastructure.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{mappingRules, typeHandler=com.paycoms.cp7.api.infrastructure.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{targetSysType}, #{userId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE excel_mapping_templates SET template_name = #{templateName}, header_structure = #{headerStructure, typeHandler=com.paycoms.cp7.api.infrastructure.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, mapping_rules = #{mappingRules, typeHandler=com.paycoms.cp7.api.infrastructure.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE target_sys_type = #{targetSysType} AND user_id = #{userId}
